invariants: clean Git HEAD exactly matches the OCI revision label
edge and worker deployments are fully converged on the inspected immutable image identity
qualification files are represented only by labels, byte sizes, and SHA-256 digests
Git state is unchanged before the evidence document is atomically written

publication_controls.required_verification: bind both GitHub attestations to the selected GHCR digest and container workflow identity before promotion

required_validation_gates: backend format, warnings-as-errors compile, tests, Hex audit, and Sobelow
web dependency audit, lint, typecheck, unit tests, Playwright journeys, and production build
contract, documentation, secret, production-bundle, release-evidence, readiness-ledger, operations-asset, Compose-exposure, and qualification-runner tests
strict formal-study and internal-pilot evidence scoring for any people-gate claim
strict Kubernetes schema validation, container smoke, and image vulnerability scanning
exact-image local staging acceptance, load, replacement, rollback, roll-forward, and restore proof

environment_boundaries.local_staging: qualify every exact candidate and retain generated evidence outside the source tree
environment_boundaries.production: not qualified; provider, managed-state, multi-zone capacity, independent security, support, on-call, compliance, license, and exact published-attestation verification gates remain
